plan.failureSummary: The cached deterministic click on the 'Documentation' link failed because the element could not be found. This suggests a change in the navigation menu structure of the Checkly website, rendering the cached selectors stale.
observedIndicators: recent website layout or menu change suspected
click execution failed to resolve element

remediationSteps.summary: Clear the Page AI cache and retry the automation run.
remediationSteps.details: Clear the Page AI cache and trigger a retry. This allows the AI agent to dynamically inspect the live page structure and discover the updated selectors for the developer documentation navigation path.

remediationSteps.summary: Verify and update navigation selectors if autonomous healing fails.
remediationSteps.details: If the autonomous retry fails, manually inspect the navigation header on checklyhq.com to verify whether 'Documentation' has moved (e.g. under the new 'Developers' dropdown instead of 'Resources') and update the prompt or selectors accordingly.

plan.notes: The test failed in DETERMINISTIC mode during the second click of the first page.ai call. The flow history shows a sudden onset of failures (current failure streak of 2) after a long period of successes, which strongly points to a recent website redesign or layout shift. Clearing the Page AI cache and allowing page.ai to run in active/autonomous mode should allow it to self-heal and find the correct element.
